revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-3-140

A large roller incorporated into the stem head to facilitate the handling of chain or lines over the bow.


Note : 

A ramp may be used instead of a roller, in which case the term bow ramp is used.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Bow roller}}
